name: In Boise Idaho, forklift training fail caused my arm break, next steps?
description: Comp claim + OSHA proof; lawyer ASAP.

mainEntity.name: In Boise Idaho, forklift training fail caused my arm break, next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp claim + OSHA proof; lawyer ASAP.
acceptedAnswer.description: File Idaho workers' comp; third-party if third-party fault; cite OSHA 1910.178.[5] Context: Idaho 1-year limit. Key factors: Training records. Practical guidance: Attorney requests docs; strong negligence case. Free filing.
